rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Phishing Url
id: 122f0cc8-9af8-462f-ae8c-5edcb70e5f95
description: Potential phishing site based on URL pattern
references:
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/rare-phishing-page-delivery-header-refresh/
- https://ublockorigin.pages.dev/filters/badware.min.txt
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/domain.parkages.click/relations
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-09-17
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection_1:
    cs-host|endswith:
    - .ru
    - .su
    - .com
    cs-host|re: ^[a-z0-9]{3,}\.[a-z0-9]{4,11}\.(ru|su|com)$
    cs-uri-stem|re: ^/[a-zA-Z0-9]{35,}$
    cs-uri-query|re: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]{25,}$
  selection_2:
    cs-uri-stem:
    - /connectivity.html
    cs-uri-query|contains: '@'
  condition: 1 of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Very possible; investigate url to confirm
level: medium
